## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's blocking you with the current faucet? Please avoid jumping straight to a solution. -->

<!-- Concrete sketch of what you'd like to see. Code snippets / UI mockups welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways you've thought about solving this. Why this proposal wins. -->

## Scope

- Affects: `server` / `claim-ui` / `dashboard` / `sdk-*` / `docs` / `deploy` / other
- Breaking change? yes / no
- Reasonable to self-implement? yes / no — if yes, are you planning a PR?
